page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 48 vCPUs. The system is equipped with 192 GB of RAM, translating to 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results show average performance across most standard compute and memory tasks, with some strong highlights. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is 1578.39, and the multi-core score is 49936.52. The server demonstrates strong memory performance, with a PassMark memory score of 2786.2, placing it in the top 25% of tested systems. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is also strong at 206.4 GB/sec. Other metrics, such as Redis SET operations at 40.87 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 26.83 GB/sec, fall within the average range.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance offers a stable resource density for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance without virtualization overhead. The lack of bundled local storage means storage performance depends on external block storage configurations. It is suited for general-purpose enterprise workloads, multi-threaded data processing, database operations, and web serving applications that benefit from high clock-speed dedicated cores and strong memory bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.12xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. It is configured with 192 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The instance does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, the server exhibits strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance of 206.4 GB/sec and a strong PassMark memory score of 2786.2, while maintaining average scores in stress-ng CPU tests and Redis SET operations. This hardware profile is suited for enterprise applications, multi-threaded data processing, database operations, and web serving workloads that require dedicated compute resources and reliable memory bandwidth.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.12xlarge is a general-purpose server with 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong memory and multi-threaded decompression performance.

tagline: A dedicated 48-core x86_64 server offering balanced memory-to-CPU resources and strong memory bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
192 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark memory performance
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Suited for database operations, web serving, and multi-threaded data processing
